title: Keto Stir Fry with Squid
description: A keto-friendly twist on a Chinese classic, featuring succulent squid and a medley of vegetables.
instructions: 1. Cut the squid into bite-sized pieces and season with salt and pepper.
2. Heat the avocado oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
3. Add the squid to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, until browned.
4. Remove the squid from the skillet and set aside.
5. Add the garlic and ginger to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
6. Add the bok choy and cauliflower to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, until tender.
7. Return the squid to the skillet and stir in the fermented soy sauce and cream cheese.
8. Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the cheese is melted and the squid is coated.
10. Garnish with green onions and sesame seeds, if desired.
